themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And every soul that eateth that which died of itself, or that which was torn with beasts, whe...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְטָהֵֽר׃: then shall he be clean - to be pure (physical sound, clear, unadulterated; levitic...".
